content:
MODULE: cosmos.infrastructure.drift_detector
FILE: cosmos/infrastructure/drift_detector.py (456 lines)
CATEGORY: infrastructure

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Drift Detector

"My infrastructure is drifting! Quick, someone anchor it!"

Detect configuration drift between desired and actual infrastructure state.

CLASSES:
- DriftType(Enum): Types of drift.
- DriftSeverity(Enum): Drift severity levels.
- DriftItem: A single drift detection.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- DriftReport: Complete drift detection report.
  Methods: def summary(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: def has_critical_drift(self) -> bool
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- DriftDetector: Infrastructure drift detection for cosmos.

Features:
- Compare Terraform state 
  Methods: async def detect_terraform_drift(self, terraform_manager, workspace) -> DriftReport
  Methods: async def detect_aws_drift(self, aws_manager, resource_types: List[str]=None) -> DriftReport
  Methods: async def detect_azure_drift(self, azure_manager, resource_groups: List[str]=None) -> DriftReport
  Methods: def get_report(self, report_id: str) -> Optional[DriftReport]
  Methods: def list_reports(self, workspace: str=None, limit: int=50) -> List[DriftReport]
  Methods: def generate_remediation_plan(self, report: DriftReport) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
  Methods: async def auto_remediate(self, report: DriftReport, terraform_manager, workspace, max_severity: Drif
